chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-349 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For katcha peshi. 07.08.2017 Mr. Raja Hans Raj Naurang, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w Inspector Sohail Sarwar o/b of SSP Hyderabad. = With reference to the order of previous date, reply/written statement has been filed by the learned Additional A.G on behalf of the respondents No.3 and 4, which are taken on record, copies whereof have been supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same, has no objection for the disposal of the present petition, if directions are given to the respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with the directions to the respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioner and further that the police officials should discharge their duties in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner, whenever he approaches them with such request, but strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
